c.d: How accurately the app compares prices across different stores and online platforms to find the best deals on an item
The number and quality of coupons, discount codes, or daily deals provided by the app
Whether the app supports scanning barcodes or QR codes to instantly find deals on items
Supported operating systems like iOS and Android to ensure accessibility for users

c.n: User Interface and Ease of Use
c.d: How user-friendly the app is for searching offers and navigating deals
Extra functionalities such as alerts for sales, price match guarantees, cashback offers, or gift card rewards
